mapper.select: SELECT u.USER_ID AS userId, u.DEPARTMENT_ID AS departmentId, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS departmentName, u.JOB_ID AS jobId, j.JOB_NAME AS jobName, u.POSITION_ID AS positionId, p.POSITION_NAME AS positionName, u.LOGIN_ID AS loginId, u.PASSWORD AS password, u.NAME AS name, u.EMAIL AS email, u.PHONE AS phone, u.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, u.STATUS AS status FROM USERS u LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN JOB j ON u.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID LEFT JOIN POSITION p ON u.POSITION_ID = p.POSITION_ID WHERE u.LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}

SELECT u.USER_ID AS userId, u.DEPARTMENT_ID AS departmentId, d.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS departmentName, u.JOB_ID AS jobId, j.JOB_NAME AS jobName, u.POSITION_ID AS positionId, p.POSITION_NAME AS positionName, u.LOGIN_ID AS loginId, u.PASSWORD AS password, u.NAME AS name, u.EMAIL AS email, u.PHONE AS phone, u.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt, u.STATUS AS status FROM USERS u LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT d ON u.DEPARTMENT_ID = d.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT JOIN JOB j ON u.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID LEFT JOIN POSITION p ON u.POSITION_ID = p.POSITION_ID WHERE u.USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT r.ROLE_CODE FROM USER_ROLE ur JOIN ROLES r ON ur.ROLE_ID = r.ROLE_ID WHERE ur.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY r.ROLE_CODE
